untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Fibonacci retracement identification (38%-62% of prior uptrend) - not available as indicator; (2) V-shape pattern recognition - requires pattern detection beyond available indicators; (3) Proximity to yearly low detection - requires yearly_low reference not in allowed list; (4) Measure rule application with dynamic height division (÷3 or ÷6) - requires candle measurement logic not supported; (5) Volume trend interpretation for performance assessment - 'volume gives clues' is too vague for structured rules. The signal is primarily qualitative pattern-based rather than quantitative indicator-based.
